companionBle.title: Companion
companionBle.subTitle: Bluetooth
companionBle.tooltip: Chat via mobile phone App or Web Client - Radio can only connect via Bluetooth

firmware.title: Companion (Observer)
firmware.subTitle: Bluetooth + Serial Logging
firmware.tooltip: Companion firmware with MESH_PACKET_LOGGING enabled — logs all mesh packets via Serial. Debug output: type, route, SNR, RSSI, hash.
